package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for url_redirect_without_validation: `http.Redirect(w, r, r.FormValue("redirect_url"), 302)` or `c.Redirect(302, c.Query("url"))` without URL validation
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario744Negative(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.FormValue("next") == "/dashboard" {
		http.Redirect(w, r, "/dashboard", http.StatusFound)
	}
}
